notes: Solid Pong implementation with AI, scoring, states, and audio, but paddle update uses hardcoded 1/60 dt instead of actual dt parameter causing inconsistent movement speed, and the title screen mode selection UI is confusing (both options shown side-by-side but require pressing 1 or 2 rather than navigating).

Looks recognizably like Pong, but paddle collision logic is flawed, title/start flow is incomplete and misleading, controls/state handling are inconsistent, and audio initialization may trigger browser/runtime issues.
